global_protection_enabled.title: Enable Agent Firewall
global_protection_enabled.description: Actively inspects all web scraping, search results, and external strings before they hit your AI models.

security_profile.title: Protection Strictness
security_profile.description: Permissive blocks overt threats. Strict utilizes multi-stage local LLM validation loops to prevent semantic bypasses.

indirect_injection.title: Block System Instructions
indirect_injection.description: Filters phrases like 'ignore all previous instructions'.

jailbreaks.title: Jailbreak Signatures
jailbreaks.description: Intercepts DAN mode, Developer Mode, and persona overrides.

destructive_commands.title: System Destruction Commands
destructive_commands.description: Blocks shell execution strings such as 'sudo rm -rf'.

pii_leak_prevention.title: Outbound PII Protection
pii_leak_prevention.description: Prevents agents from exfiltrating API keys or private environmental data to the open internet.

use_ollama_evaluator.title: Dual-LLM Semantic Checking
use_ollama_evaluator.description: Routes suspicious snippets to a lightning-fast local model to confirm intent.

custom_user_patterns.title: Custom Blocklist Keywords
custom_user_patterns.description: User-defined phrase lists or specific terms you want strictly scrubbed from search returns.
